## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 8, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _spittinpigeon_, Jul 11, 2026, 1/5: "Great for banking, terrible for trading. The investment portion of the app is SLOW. Like Home Depot app slow, borderline useless."
            2. _Scott G_, Jul 15, 2026, 2/5: "Bank side is fine. Investing is slower than molasses. Trying to navigate through the past performance timelines is dog slow. Many times nothing is displayed...making investing on the app useless. I should have put my money in a different app."
            3. _Virginia Gonzales_, Jul 8, 2026, 5/5: "Just wondering if anyone else has issues with trying to log in with the biometrics? Last few tines it wont work right away"
